action_set_definitions.name: get_restaurant_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the complete current state of the restaurant environment, including table statuses, active reservations, the waitlist, and the current simulated time.

action_set_definitions.name: cancel_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Cancels an existing reservation, typically used for no-shows. This action will update the associated table status to 'available'.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the reservation to be cancelled.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_tables_to_party
action_set_definitions.description: Seats a party from the waitlist at one or more tables. Use multiple table IDs to accommodate larger parties through combining tables.

party_name.description: The name of the party from the waitlist.

table_ids.description: A list of one or more table IDs to be assigned to this party.

state_description.tables: A list of all physical tables in the restaurant, including their unique ID, seating capacity, and current status (e.g., 'available', 'occupied', 'reserved').
state_description.active_reservations: A registry of confirmed bookings containing guest names, party sizes, assigned table IDs, and time slots.
state_description.current_simulated_time: The current time within the simulation (24-hour format HH:MM).
state_description.waitlist: A queue of parties waiting for a table to become available when the restaurant is at full capacity.
state_description.restaurant_status: The overall status of the restaurant (e.g., 'open', 'closed', 'fully_booked').
